title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2 and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed with any model served by Ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs, chat, or embedding backends.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, import models, RAG, multi-user, Dark/Light themes).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, Kotlin coroutines, Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma; ingest PDFs, query with citations.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Clean React chatbot frontend that talks to a local Ollama instance via the REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style autocomplete for VS Code.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for chatting, managing models, and scripting prompts.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Custom n8n node that enables no-code workflows with Ollama models.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async/await, streaming, and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django package adding Ollama model support to the admin and as a REST endpoint.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama API with GenServer and LiveView examples.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: End-to-end RAG starter using Ollama embeddings, Chroma, LangChain and Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot that leverages Ollama for on-prem AI assistance with channel & DM support.
